title: cassia javanica subsp. pubiflora
intro: Cassia javanica subsp. pubiflora is a plant species that belongs to the legume family, characterized by its yellow flowers and hairy leaves. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Cassia javanica subsp. pubiflora has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, skin infections, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves and flowers can also be used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures and topical creams.
